1.name: Orient
1.description: Set direction, context, purpose, or closure.

components.role: Opens a section with title, subject, objective, and level indicators
Creates felt need before explanation arrives
Sustained prose that builds a mental model
Lists assumed knowledge with optional refresher pop-ups
Connects the section forward to what the concept enables
Makes knowledge speakable - rehearse explaining the concept
Standalone highlighted callout ΓÇö tip, warning, info, or exam note
Lists what this section covered ΓÇö key takeaways as bullets
Named visual break between parts within a section

2.name: Build Knowledge
2.description: Define, compare, organize, or anchor key knowledge.

components.role: Anchors a formal term with formal and plain versions
Groups related terms that belong together conceptually
Vocabulary visible in peripheral field, updates by section
Side-by-side comparison of 2-3 related values or concepts
Visually prominent stat, formula, or date that anchors the section
Holds multiple concepts in view so distinctions become structural

3.name: Model
3.description: Show a method, example, or process before independent work.

components.role: Shows reasoning in action step by step, each step justified
A repeatable procedure where order is non-negotiable

4.name: Practice and Check
4.description: Let students answer, practise, retrieve, reflect, or show thinking.

components.role: Problems at calibrated difficulty with progressive hints and optional solutions
Quick concept check with immediate feedback mid-section
Pauses forward motion and turns attention inward
Simple write-in box for student responses ΓÇö no framing beyond a prompt
Open question with write-in space and optional mark scheme
components.cognitive_job: Recall and explain in own words

components.role: Cloze passage with student-completed blanks ΓÇö tests recall not recognition

5.name: Address Mistakes
5.description: Warn against misconceptions or correct common errors.

components.role: Names a specific misconception before the learner makes it

6.name: Visualize
6.description: Make spatial, relational, chronological, or visual structure visible.

components.role: Makes spatial or relational structure visible
Before and after comparison with a drag slider
A progression of diagrams that tells a sequence
Turns chronology into a readable instructional spine
components.cognitive_job: Follow cause and sequence over time

7.name: Interact
7.description: Let learners manipulate, observe, or explore a concept interactively.

components.role: Manipulate a variable and discover the concept through observation
